debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : Countable ι
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ Measurable fun x => x ⊆ u

failed_attempts:
<| MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurableSet_preimage.2 <|
    MeasurableSet.pi Set.countable_univ fun i _ ↦ by
      by_cases i ∈ u <;> simp_all [measurableSet_compl_iff]

<| MeasurableSet.iInter fun i ↦ by
    classical
    by_cases hi : i ∈ u
    · simp [hi]
    · simp [hi, imp_false]
      exact ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable).measurableSet_preimage trivial

<| (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurableSet_preimage.1 <| by
    convert MeasurableSet.pi Set.countable_univ fun _ _ ↦ trivial
    ext
    simp [Set.subset_def, Set.mem_pi]).measurable

<| (MeasurableSet.countable_iInter fun i ↦ by
    by_cases hi : i ∈ u <;> simp [hi]
    exact (by fun_prop : Measurable fun x ↦ i ∈ x).measurableSet_preimage {False}).measurable

<| by
    classical
    rw [← MeasurableSet.compl_iff, Set.compl_setOf, Set.not_subset_iff_exists_mem_notMem,
      Set.setOf_exists]
    exact MeasurableSet.iUnion fun i ↦ by
      by_cases hi : i ∈ u <;> simp [hi, MeasurableSpace.measurableSet_generateFrom ⟨i, rfl⟩]

<| MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurableSet_preimage.1 <| by
    convert MeasurableSet.pi uᶜ.to_countable fun _ _ ↦ measurableSet_singleton False
    ext
    simp [Set.subset_def, Set.mem_pi]

<| MeasurableSet.iInter fun i ↦ by
    classical; by_cases h : i ∈ u <;> simp [h, MeasurableSpace.measurable_generateFrom ⟨i, rfl⟩]

<| by
    simpa [Set.not_subset_iff_exists_mem_notMem] using
      (MeasurableSet.biUnion (Set.to_countable _) fun i _ ↦ measurable_set_mem i).compl

<| MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurableSet_preimage.2 <|
    MeasurableSet.univ_pi fun i ↦ by classical; by_cases i ∈ u <;> simp [h]

<| MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable.measurableSet_preimage <|
    MeasurableSet.univ_pi fun i ↦ by
      classical; by_cases i ∈ u <;> simp [*]

<| MeasurableSet.biInter (Set.to_countable _) fun i _ ↦
    MeasurableSet.compl <| (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable.eval i).measurableSet_preimage <|
      measurableSet_singleton True

<| by
    simp only [Set.subset_def]
    exact measurableSet_forall_countable fun _ ↦ by fun_prop
